title: Intense Juicy Spanish Potatoes Gambas Al Ajillo
description: A tangy and juicy Spanish dish featuring charlotte potatoes, this lacto-vegetarian friendly recipe is a perfect hangover cure, inspired by the traditional gambas al ajillo.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the cubed potatoes with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the potatoes are roasting, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the white wine and vegetable broth to the skillet and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the sauce for 5 minutes, until it has slightly thickened.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional 1 minute.
After the potatoes have roasted for 20 minutes, remove them from the oven and add them to the skillet with the garlic sauce.
Toss the potatoes in the sauce until they are evenly coated, then sprinkle with grated manchego cheese.
